import sys
import bisect

def main():
    import sys
    input = sys.stdin.read
    data = input().split()
    N = int(data[0])
    A = list(map(int, data[1:]))

    A.sort()
    res = 0

    for i in range(N):
        for j in range(i + 1, N):
            max_val = A[j]
            min_val = A[i]
            res += max_val // min_val

    print(res)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
